title: This 24-foot inflatable drone can fly for 10 hours, covering 500 miles one way, and can probably fit in your car
summary: The company is developing the aircraft for inspection, surveillance and remote logistics missions that require persistent aerial coverage. The drone’s inflatable structure could allow teams to transport a large aircraft without requiring a dedicated trailer or specialised ground equipment.
caption: output/2026-07-21/this-24-foot-inflatable-drone-can-fly-for-10-hours-covering-500-miles-.txt
